# VDS General Trading LLC
> UAE-registered Dubai trading company delivering AI voice automation, digital marketing (SEO/GEO/AEO), agro commodity trading, and MOHAP-compliant medical equipment supply.

## Services

### AI Voice & Email Automation Agents (UAE)
AI-powered voice agents and email automation for UAE businesses. 24/7 inbound call handling, lead qualification, CRM integration. English and Arabic. Available across UAE, GCC.
URL: https://vdsdxb.ae/ai-automation

### Digital Marketing — SEO, GEO, AEO (Dubai)
Full-service digital marketing agency in Dubai. SEO (Search Engine Optimisation), GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation for ChatGPT/Perplexity/AI Overviews), AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation), PPC, social media. Serving UAE and GCC businesses.
URL: https://vdsdxb.ae/digital-marketing

### Agro Commodity Trading (Dubai, UAE)
Wholesale and re-export of agricultural commodities: onion, potato, garlic, ginger, pulses, spices. Jebel Ali consolidation. Export to UAE, GCC, Europe, United States.
URL: https://vdsdxb.ae/agro-trading

### MOHAP Medical Equipment Supply & Rental (UAE)
MOHAP-compliant medical equipment trading and rental for hospitals, clinics, polyclinics and distributors in UAE and GCC. Diagnostic equipment, patient monitoring, surgical instruments, consumables.
URL: https://vdsdxb.ae/healthcare-equipment

## Company

- Legal name: VDS General Trading LLC
- Registered: Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE LLC)
- Founded: 2024
- Markets served: UAE, GCC (Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman), MENA, Europe, United States
